= IKE Version Management Extension

Maven 4 build extension that implements the IKE GA·convention
        for version-property naming: ${groupId·artifactId} (U+00B7
        MIDDLE DOT). Injects alias indirections from a bundled
        manifest, fails fast on undeclared ${G·A} references, and
        detects ${G.A} typos with a corrective hint. See
        IKE-Network/ike-issues#470, #472.
